productDisplayName: Skechers Men Shape Black Sports Shoes
description: Run less, get more with the skechers Resistance Runner shoes. Fab to look and a great gift for the feet, this pair of running shoes is designed with the best of technologies to offer the best comfort and health quicker. The Resamax kinetic wedge technology helps create a more fluid stride and helps reduce injuries and enhance performance. skechers promises that running with the Resistance Runners helps activate postural muscles by upto 85%, activate gluteus medius muscles by upto 71%, calf muscles upto 68% and burn 13.2% more calories than other running shoes. What's better, this shoe comes with an additional pair of laces in a different colour to suit your style. So jet set, pick up your pair and burn away those calories with ease! Upper Meshed upper with an inner meshed bootie for absolute comfort and breathability Strategically placed synthetic leather overlays for absolute comfort, support and style Heavily padded and meshed collar and tongue Lace-up system for a snug, customised Fit Collection name embossed on lateral ankle Midsole Ultra-light, injection moulded kinetic footbed for absolute comfort Removable footbed to accommodate an orthotic TPU midsole for absolute lightweight comfort Outsole Has a high abrasion rubber outsole with Kinetic Wedge technology in the outsole to absorb more energy and elevate muscle activity with every stride Soft kinetic wedge to absorb impact and spread it throughout the foot to relieve joint and back pain, and ensure a comfortable run Balance pods that create slight and constant shifts in weight to offer a more intense workout with lesser stress Curved rocker bottom for smoother heel-strike to toe-off transition, helping you run in a more natural state Shoe care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
